vulnerabilities.description: The `getGroupById` method in `GroupService` lacks verification for user access rights. It can lead to unauthorized access to group details (IDOR vulnerability).
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement a check to ensure that the requesting user (userId) has the appropriate permissions (e.g., membership or admin status) to access the group details.

vulnerabilities.description: The `linkTelegram` method in `GroupService` does not ensure that the user attempting to link a Telegram chat ID is authorized to do so (e.g., group admin).
vulnerabilities.fix: Add logic to verify the user's role or admin status in the group before proceeding with linking the Telegram chat ID.
